name: Crab-Apple Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the crab-apples and remove any stems or cores.
2. Place the crab-apples in a large pot and cover with water.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the fruit is soft.
4. Drain the apples, reserving the cooking liquid if desired.
5. Rub through a sieve to extract the juice and pulp.
6. Return the juice (if saved) or add enough water to create a smooth puree.
7. Add 3 cups sugar to the puree.
8. Bring to a simmer, stirring frequently.
9. Continue boiling until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
10. Turn off the heat and let cool completely before serving.
